data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifying choices improves user decision-making speed.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined playlist and content navigation UI.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimizing target size and positioning for ease of use.
data.technical_spec: Large, easy-to-tap buttons on mobile platforms.

data.title: Aesthetic Usability Effect
data.description: Users perceive aesthetically pleasing designs as easier to use.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Users prefer your site to work the same way as other sites they know.

data.title: Peak-End Rule
data.description: Experience judgment is governed by peaks and endings.
data.technical_spec: Highlight moments like Discover Weekly releases.
